title: Lab 35: Process Priority and Tuned
description: Tune servervm and adjust the nice level of a long-running process there.

tasks: Install the tuned package if it is not already present and activate the tuned profile throughput-performance on servervm.
Start the command sleep 3600 in the background on servervm and save its PID in /root/sleep35.pid.
Adjust the nice value of that process so it becomes 5.
hints: Keep the tuning task on servervm, not clientvm.
Store the PID before changing the nice value.
checks: ssh admin@servervm sudo tuned-adm active | grep -Fq 'throughput-performance'
ssh admin@servervm sudo test -s /root/sleep35.pid && ssh admin@servervm sudo ps -o ni= -p "$(ssh admin@servervm sudo cat /root/sleep35.pid)" | grep -qx ' 5'
solution_outline: Enable tuned and set throughput-performance on servervm.
Launch sleep 3600 in the background and record its PID.
Use renice to move the process to nice value 5.
task_titles: Activate the tuned profile on servervm
Start the long-running sleep process on servervm
